evals.name: local-logo-svg
evals.prompt: Vectorize the local image at /Users/tonyg/Documents/TC/GitHub/1Place2Post/assets/branding/icons/logo_1024.png and save it as an SVG in the same directory. Use the local CLI method for speed.
evals.expected_output: An SVG file named logo_1024.svg should be created in the branding/icons directory.

evals.name: remote-url-eps
evals.prompt: I need this image vectorized for Illustrator: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c3/Google_Gemini_logo.svg/2560px-Google_Gemini_logo.svg.png. Please use the Premium Browser method (Vectorizer.ai) and save it as an EPS file in the current directory.
evals.expected_output: An EPS file of the Gemini logo should be downloaded and saved.

evals.name: bw-sketch-trace
evals.prompt: Take the attached image of a hand-drawn sketch and trace it into a clean black and white SVG using the best local tool available.
evals.expected_output: A clean B&W SVG should be produced.
